project_name: Dunearn House（Turf City 首盘 · Bukit Timah）
confidence_note: 身份与地价：高置信（URA GLS 招标、EdgeProp 交叉验证）。户型/座数/朝向：中置信——目前只有中介营销站口径，发展商官方图册未发布。VVIP 预览日（~2026-07-10）：低置信——仅中介网络声称，未见官方/主流媒体确认。定价 S$2,900-3,100 psf 为分析师预估（CBRE/SRI），非价单。本报告为 pre-launch 研判：所有结论以正式价单为准重校。
summary: 【2026-07-03，预览前一周】Dunearn House 是 Bukit Timah Turf City 重建区（176 公顷、15,000-20,000 户、20-30 年分期）的第一个私宅盘：Frasers Property + Sekisui House + CSC Land 联合体，2025-07 以 S$491.45m（S$1,410 psf ppr）拿地，99 年地契，约 380 户（2BR 530-680 / 3BR 870-1,010 / 4BR 1,180-1,380 sqft），5 座（前排 3×10 层沿 Dunearn Rd、后排 2×19 层面向重建区绿地），预估 S$2,900-3,100 psf，预计 TOP ~2030 年底。关键坐标：现有 Sixth Ave 地铁（DT）步行约 5 分钟；未来 CRL CR14 Turf City 换乘站 2032 年通车。定价参照系（Tier-1，Investment Suite 2Y 成交带）：同类 99LH 新盘 8@BT 均价 S$2,735、隔壁 freehold 低密度存量 Sixth Avenue Residences（TOP 2010）均价 S$2,154、freehold 的 Royalgreen 均 S$2,806 / Leedon Green 均 S$2,959 / Watten House 均 S$3,274——以 99LH 身份要价接近 FH 邻居，是『首发+新区叙事』溢价；但第二幅地 Wing Tai-Metro 拿价已 +15.2%（S$1,625 psf ppr，预计 2H2027 以 S$3,150-3,300 开盘），为本盘定价提供前向支撑。开发商侧证据需打折使用：The Orie（2025-01 首周 86% 去化、均价 S$2,704）为 CDL 牵头、Frasers 与 Sekisui 参与的联合体——与本盘三方 JV 仅两方重叠，CSC Land 未参与、CDL 不在本盘（且 CDL 两次竞标 Dunearn 地块均落败）。本盘这一确切 JV 组合尚无已完成的新加坡项目记录。模型结论：评分 70/100 → SELECTIVE；6 年持有 base case 需 +8.5% 总涨幅才保本（含 4 年 BUC 利息与交易成本）。 — [EN] The first private launch in the 176-ha Turf City redevelopment: Frasers/Sekisui/CSC JV, 99-yr LH, ~380 units, est. S$2,900-3,100 psf (analyst estimates; no official price list yet), TOP ~end-2030. Priced near freehold neighbours despite 99-yr tenure — a first-mover premium partially underwritten by Site 2's land price (+15.2%) and the precinct's 2032 CRL interchange. Scorecard 70/100 → SELECTIVE (right stack, right price).

identity.address: 760-770 Dunearn Road（Turf City 首幅 GLS，145,173 sqft）
identity.district: D11/Bukit Timah（Swiss Club/Turf City 分区；紧邻 D10 Sixth Ave）；EdgeProp 归类 D11/CCR
identity.developer: Frasers Property + Sekisui House + CSC Land Group JV（注：此确切组合首次合作出盘；Frasers/Sekisui 曾参与 CDL 牵头的 The Orie，CSC 未参与）
identity.blocks: 5 座：3×10 层（沿 Dunearn Rd）+ 2×19 层（面向重建区）；南北朝向；'Canopy of Memory' 呼应保育看台
identity.preview: VVIP 预览 ~2026-07-10（中介口径，未官方确认）

pricing_positioning: 定位（Tier-1 重做，比价全部换用 Investment Suite 2Y 成交带）：预估 S$2,900-3,100（base ~S$3,000）vs 8@BT（99LH）2Y 均 S$2,735、Sixth Avenue Residences（Freehold 低密度存量、贴着 Turf City）均 S$2,154、Reserve Residences 均 S$2,579、Royalgreen（FH）均 S$2,806、Leedon Green（FH）均 S$2,959、Watten House（FH 新盘）均 S$3,274。判读不变但更锋利：以 99LH 身份要价贴着 FH 邻居（Royalgreen/Leedon），较同类 99LH 新盘先例（8@BT）+10%、较隔壁 freehold 存量（Sixth Ave Res.）+39%——99LH 新盘对 FH 邻居的溢价，含金量要求更高——溢价买的是全新+新区叙事+CR14；Site 2 地价 +15.2% 是前向支撑。模型（2BR+S 678 sqft @ S$3,000，75% LTV @2.8%，持有 6 年含 4 年 BUC）：base 租金 S$6.75 psf/mo（comps 带 S$5.9-8.0 的中段）→ 毛收益率 ~2.7%、保本退出 S$3,256 psf（+8.5%）；bull 租金 S$8.0 psf/mo（小户型 psf 上限口径——高于本报告 2BR 月租带 S$4.0-4.8k 的中枢，仅作上限敏感性） → ~3.2%、保本 S$3,227 psf（+7.6%）。贷款利率取 2.8% 为 6 年持有的保守常态化假设（2026-06 市场 2 年固定仅 ~1.3-1.4%——若按 1.5-2% 融资，保本 psf 显著下移）。

comparables.name: Dunearn House (subject, Site 1) - analyst pre-launch estimate
comparables.note: 380 units, 99-yr LH, land S$1,410 psf ppr (S$491.45m, 145,173 sqft site). Not yet a confirmed developer price — VVIP preview ~10 Jul 2026.

comparables.name: Turf City GLS Site 2 (Wing Tai-Metro JV, ~330 units, adjacent) - projected future launch
comparables.note: Land S$1,625 psf ppr, 15.2% above Site 1's S$1,410 psf ppr (includes mandatory supermarket+childcare). Sets forward pricing marker for precinct.

comparables.name: Watten House (D11, Shelford Rd, freehold, UOL/SingLand, 180 units)
comparables.psf: 2Y 成交带 $3,118 PSF–$3,386 PSF（均 $3,274 PSF）【Tier-1：Investment Suite（URA caveat）】
comparables.note: FH 新盘（D11 Shelford）——belt 天花板。Nearest ultra-prime Bukit Timah freehold comp; sets belt ceiling. Dunearn House is 99-yr LH so should trade at a discount to this.

comparables.name: Royalgreen (D10, Anamalai Ave, freehold, AllGreen, 285 units)
comparables.psf: 2Y 成交带 $2,592 PSF–$2,981 PSF（均 $2,806 PSF）【Tier-1：Investment Suite（URA caveat）】
comparables.note: FH（D10 Anamalai）——freehold 参照。对 Tier-1 2Y 均价 S$2,806 计算，较区域参照的溢价口径以 app 带为准. Freehold vs Dunearn's LH.

comparables.name: 8@BT (Bukit Timah Link, 99-yr LH, 160 units（Tier-1 口径）, near Beauty World MRT)
comparables.psf: 2Y 成交带 $2,527 PSF–$3,033 PSF（均 $2,735 PSF）【Tier-1：Investment Suite（URA caveat）】
comparables.note: 99LH（Beauty World）——最近的 99LH 新盘先例。Closest recent 99-yr LH new-launch precedent for the belt. Dunearn House's ~S$3,000 psf base case is a ~+10% over 8@BT's 2Y transacted average (Tier-1).

comparables.name: The Reserve Residences (D21, Beauty World, Far East Org, 732 units, MRT-linked)
comparables.psf: 2Y 成交带 $2,304 PSF–$3,106 PSF（均 $2,579 PSF）【Tier-1：Investment Suite（URA caveat）】
comparables.note: 99LH 综合体（D21）。Ceiling for MRT-linked mixed-use product in the wider cluster is well below Dunearn House's target, despite MRT linkage advantage Dunearn lacks (no MRT until 2032).

comparables.name: The LINQ @ Beauty World (D21, 99-yr LH, 120 units, TOP 2025)
comparables.note: Very illiquid comp (1 sale/12mo) — use cautiously.

comparables.name: Pinetree Hill (D21, Pine Grove, 99-yr LH, 520 units, launched Jul 2023) / Nava Grove (adjacent, Nov 2024)
comparables.psf: Pinetree Hill launched ~S$2,460 avg, now listing ~S$2,435+; Nava Grove launched avg S$2,448, remaining units now S$2,677-2,804
comparables.note: Ulu Pandan cluster ~S$450-600 psf below Dunearn House target, reflecting less prestigious address one MRT stop further out.

comparables.name: The Sixth Avenue Residences (D10, adjacent to Turf City, older project)
comparables.psf: 2Y 成交带 $1,612 PSF–$2,359 PSF（均 $2,154 PSF）【Tier-1：Investment Suite（URA caveat）】
comparables.note: Freehold 低密度存量（TOP 2010，175 户），紧邻 Turf City——存量参照。Existing D10 stock right next to the site trades far below Dunearn House's S$3,000 target — shows scale of new-launch premium being asked.

comparables.name: Leedon Green (D10, freehold, TOP 2024, 638 units)
comparables.note: FH 参照的中枢；见定位段。

comparables.name: （口径注记）8@BT 与 Reserve Residences 属 D21/RCR，本盘为 D11/CCR
comparables.note: 跨区比较需加区位修正；+10% vs 8@BT 为未修正口径，修正后溢价更高。

location: First private residential launch inside the URA-designated Bukit Timah Turf City precinct, which is officially planned (URA Draft Master Plan 2025) to yield 15,000-20,000 homes across ~20 residential sites + 3 white sites + a school site + a healthcare site, built out over 20-30 years -- early buyers face a multi-decade construction-neighbor environment.

North Grandstand (1980s Modernist structure) and other heritage clusters (27 buildings across 5 clusters) will be conserved/repurposed; Dunearn House's marketed 'Canopy of Memory' design concept references the Grandstand roofline, and back blocks (19-storey) reportedly face the Turf City precinct/green space side.

Sixth Avenue MRT (Downtown Line, existing) reported within ~4-6 min walk (~0.52km, unverified precise figure); future Turf City MRT interchange (Cross Island Line Phase 2) planned nearby but CRL Phase 2 is targeted around 2032 -- roughly 6 years post-preview.

School catchments: Methodist Girls' School (Primary), 11 Blackmore Drive S599986, plausibly within 1km given King Albert Park-area geography (needs OneMap confirmation). Nanyang Primary (52 King's Road S268097) and Raffles Girls' Primary are described by marketing sources only as 'in the neighbourhood,' NOT confirmed within 1km -- likely outside 1km and possibly outside 2km for Nanyang Primary specifically; independent OneMap/MOE distance verification strongly recommended before treating any school catchment as a buy thesis pillar.

Second Turf City GLS site (Wing Tai-Metro win) is on a larger plot (~205,000 sqft, ~330 units) immediately following/adjacent in the same precinct, expected to launch 2H 2027 at a projected S$3,150-3,300 psf -- both a future comp and future construction-noise neighbor for Dunearn House residents.
Sixth Ave MRT（DT7）步行约 5 分钟（营销口径 ~0.52km——URA 通稿确认全区在地铁 800m 内）；CRL CR14 Turf City 换乘站 2032 年通车（约 7 分钟步行，届时本盘已 TOP ~2 年）
MRT 汇总：Sixth Avenue（DT7）约 0.5km/5 分钟（营销口径；URA 通稿确认整个 precinct 处于地铁 800m 内）；CRL CR14 Turf City 换乘站 2032 年通车（到站入口的实际步距未经实测）——届时本盘已 TOP 约 2 年
demand_supply: NUS Law faculty relocated from Bukit Timah campus back to Kent Ridge (effective Aug 2025) — only LKYSPP remains at 469C Bukit Timah Rd; this weakens (does not eliminate) the NUS-linked tenant-pool thesis.

Chinese International School (CNIS) sits at 60 Dunearn Road, essentially on the same road as the GLS site — a concrete, proximate international-school rental catchment (fees S$28k-50k/yr imply tenant affordability for premium rents); Holland International School (Bukit Tinggi Rd) and Wise Oaks International (Upper Bukit Timah Rd) are secondary catchment; Hwa Chong International and SJI International are further away than initially assumed.

Realistic new-launch 2BR rent in the belt: nearest comparable Fourth Avenue Residences (off Dunearn Rd) achieves ~S$3,600-10,500/month across unit types, gross yield reported ~2.77-3.5%; Forett-area 2BR comps run S$4,200-4,800/month (~2.6-2.9% yield); a defensible band for a new ~600-680sqft 2BR is roughly S$4,000-4,800/month — gross yield on a S$2,900-3,100 psf purchase likely lands ~2.6-3.2%, unexceptional, in line with district norms not a premium.

Sixth Avenue MRT (DTL) is ~500m from the site today for CBD access; future CR14 Turf City MRT (CRL) is sited at the former Grandstand within the precinct but exact walk distance from the Dunearn House plot to the station entrance is unverified; CR14 targeted completion 2032.

Only 2 Turf City residential GLS sites transacted so far: Site 1 (Dunearn House, 380 units) and Site 2 (Wing Tai-Metro JV, ~330 units, ~2H2027 launch) — precinct-wide masterplan cites ~176ha supporting 15,000-20,000 residents over 2-3 decades, but this figure is sourced from secondary commentary, not verified in the original 2022 URA press release (which covered only tenant-transition timing). [Needs further verification against an official URA masterplan doc]

Nearby but non-Turf-City competing supply: Holland Plain + Holland Link combined ~510 units (Holland Plain ~280 units awarded to Sim Lian, sole bidder, S$1,491 psf ppr, 7 May 2026; Holland Link ~230 units), expected launch ~H2 2027 — competes for the same prime-CCR buyer pool. Sim Lian's status as sole bidder (vs 9 bids for Dunearn Site 1) may signal developer caution on absorption capacity for further prime-CCR supply.

URA developer sales momentum: Q1 2026 sales fell to 2,013 units (ex-EC), a second consecutive quarterly decline (-19.2% qoq); May 2026 new home sales collapsed to 447 units (-71.1% mom from April's 1,548), the lowest in 3 months, mainly due to lack of fresh launches (only Hudson Place Residences, 327 units, launched in May, selling 201 units/61.5% at avg S$2,458 psf). Jan-May 2026 total new home sales: 4,008 units.

Forward GLS supply pipeline remains very high: 2H2026 Confirmed List will add 4,745 private residential units, bringing full-year 2026 Confirmed List supply to 9,320 units — more than 50% above the 10-year annual average — meaning absorption risk is a market-wide dynamic, not unique to Turf City, and Dunearn House will be competing against a historically large supply wave through 2026-2027.
investment_thesis: URA Turf City masterplan (unveiled 2025) confirms development is phased to start with areas closest to Dunearn Road first — Dunearn House benefits from being nearest the earliest-built amenities (Racecourse Neighbourhood: 2 conserved heritage grandstands + new central open space; Stables Commune F&B/lifestyle cluster explicitly sited on Dunearn Road). Precinct overall targets 15,000-20,000 homes (incl. first Bukit Timah HDB in ~40 years) over 20-30 years.
CR14 Turf City MRT station (Cross Island Line Phase 2): LTA awarded the S$530m civil contract May 2024, construction started Q3 2024, targeted completion 2032 — a real but decade-out catalyst.

Bukit Timah-Rochor Green Corridor: linear park along Bukit Timah Canal linking the Rail Corridor to Kallang Riverside Park; Phase 1 (~1km, Rifle Range Rd to Jalan Kampong Chantek) targeted complete by 2027 — a NEAR-TERM amenity catalyst, and it doubles as the canal-widening flood-mitigation project.

Wing Tai-Metro JV won the second Turf City GLS site (28 Apr 2026) at S$532.99m / ~S$1,625 psf ppr — 15% above Dunearn House's own S$1,410 psf ppr land cost, and beat out a re-bid from the SAME Frasers/CSC/Sekisui JV (S$1,576 psf ppr) — bullish for precinct land-value trajectory, though it confirms Dunearn House itself locked in land at the cheaper end of the curve.
risks: 99-yr leasehold Dunearn House competes directly against freehold landed alternatives on/near the same road: Dunearn Estate freehold semi-detached ~S$7.4-14.2M, detached ~S$13M+ — a real competing-capital risk for the targeted affluent buyer segment.

First-mover-into-empty-precinct risk is real: buyers purchase years ahead of the MRT (2032), parks, and most amenities, implying likely construction noise/disruption from the wider Turf City build-out (15-20k homes over 20-30 years) for a decade or more.

Dunearn Road has a live, recent flash-flood history: 5 of 7 flash floods in the wider area since 2018 were specifically on Dunearn Road, most recently 29 Dec 2024; PUB is widening/deepening a 900m stretch of Bukit Timah Canal, targeted complete by 2026 — verify the specific plot's flood/elevation history before committing.
价格动能：Q1 2026 非有地全国 +1.3%、CCR +0.6%（放缓）——高 psf 新盘上攻需靠新区叙事而非指数动能。（注：landed 指数 -0.4% 属不同资产类别，仅作区域情绪参照。）
SSD tightened 4 Jul 2025: holding period 3→4 years, rates raised to 16/12/8/4/0% by year — this is now structurally an own-stay-or-long-hold play, not a flip play, for any 2026 buyer.

VVIP preview date (10 Jul 2026) and price band (S$2,900-3,100 psf, though some sites claim S$2,4xx-2,8xx or S$3,000-3,200) are sourced ONLY from marketing/agent/SEO sites, not confirmed by any primary source found — treat as unverified developer guidance.
District classification (D10 vs D11) is inconsistent across sources — verify via URA/OneMap before finalizing comps or cooling-measure segment analysis.
payment_regulatory: ABSD (unchanged since 27 Apr 2023, per multiple secondary sources; IRAS page itself only yielded navigation on fetch, not the table): Singapore Citizen 0%/20%/30% (1st/2nd/3rd+); PR 5%/30%/35%; Foreigner 60% flat; Entity 65% flat. US citizens/PRs (US-SG FTA) and Iceland/Liechtenstein/Norway/Switzerland nationals (EFTA) get SC-equivalent treatment (0/20/30).

SSD for residential property, effective for purchases on/after 4 Jul 2025: Year 1 = 16%, Year 2 = 12%, Year 3 = 8%, Year 4 = 4%, Year 5+ = 0% (up from pre-4-Jul-2025 regime of 12/8/4/0% over 3 years). Applies to condos, landed, HDB, ECs alike.

Mortgage backdrop: 2-year fixed home loan rates as low as 1.30-1.40% p.a. as of June 2026; 3-month compounded SORA fell to ~1.07% from a ~3% peak in early 2025 — a genuine affordability tailwind partially offsetting ABSD/SSD friction for long-term holders.
BUC 累进付款：签约 20%（含 5% 现金）→ 地基 10% →…→ TOP 25%；SSD 4 年 16/12/8/4%（2025-07 起）——『炒楼花』在本规则下 4 年内退出成本极高，按 ≥6 年持有规划
模型现金流参考（2BR+S 678sqft @S$3,000）：总价 ~S$2.034m、BSD ~S$71,300、首付+印花现金 ~S$579,800；base 保本退出 S$3,256 psf（+8.5%）；bull（租金 S$8 psf/mo 上限口径）S$3,227 psf（+7.6%）

verdict.detail: 评分 70/100（明细：location_connectivity 17/20, developer 8/8（按三家成员各自履历计——该确切组合无合作先例已另列风险）, tenure_site 8/10, price_positioning 9/22, product 10/10, rental_demand 8/12, supply_competition 2/10, catalysts 8/8）。买点：三家大型开发商组合（各自履历成熟——但此确切 JV 组合无已完成项目记录）、CR14 兑现前的首发价、Site 2 地价 +15% 的前向支撑；压点：99LH 却贴着 FH 邻居定价、身后 10-15 幅地/约 15-20k 户的长期供应管道、新区头几年『工地环绕』。执行建议：只在实际价单 ≤~S$2,950 psf 的高效 2BR/2BR+S（后排朝绿地栈）出手；若均价 >S$3,100 或首周去化 <50%，等 2H2027 Site 2 双盘竞价再议。自住>投资；投资者按 ≥6 年持有并接受 base ~2.7% 毛租金收益率（bull 情形 ~3.2%）。

Dunearn Rd 本段洪水记录未单独核实（Bukit Timah 运河扩容 2026 完工目标沿线）
